title: Watch Trump news from the weekend from the Trump Connect reporter
shortDescription: Trump told CNBC he didn't care if Iran peace talks collapsed. DOJ may be backing off the 'anti-weaponization' fund, and these primaries are today.

title: Minnesota Republicans face backlash over Chauvin silence tribute
shortDescription: Minnesota GOP distances itself from a moment of silence at its convention for the former Minneapolis police officer convicted in George Floyd's killing.

title: Trump's bill changed 529 plans. How does it compare to Trump Accounts?
shortDescription: President Donald Trump's backed 'One Big Beautiful Bill Act' created the upcoming Trump Accounts. Also for education savings, it changed 529 plans.

title: Trump tells Supreme Court to expect $83 million appeal in Carroll case
shortDescription: Trump lawyers told the Supreme Court they will soon appeal the $83.3 million verdict in the E. Jean Carroll case. The court is sitting on a related appeal.

title: California governor race updates: Will Democrats pull off a sweep?
shortDescription: The 2026 primary season marches forward with arguably Democrat’s biggest prize at stake

title: Trump signs AI order that seeks access to new models before release
shortDescription: President Trump signed an order that asks AI developers to voluntarily submit their models to the federal government to review for security risks.

title: Six states vote in high stakes primary elections
shortDescription: Voters in six states cast ballots in primaries that could shape President Donald Trump second term and major races nationwide.

title: Trump endorses missing Republican congressman
shortDescription: Tom Kean Jr. hasn't been seen on Capitol Hill since early March and has told a close circle he's dealing with a medical issue.

title: Dr. Oz touts Trump's 'excellent' health
shortDescription: Dr. Oz praised President Trump health after routine exam during a press briefing. Dr. Oz is not Trump's personal physician.

title: What the National Guard changed in Washington DC — and what it didn’t
shortDescription: A new study has found the National Guard deployment has not slowed down violent crime in Washington DC, but it has had some benefits.

title: Trump endorses a missing Republican congressman
shortDescription: President Trump said the congressman, who hasn't been seen on Capitol Hill since early March, is "working tirelessly."

title: Trump says he will attend rescheduled White House Correspondents' Dinner
shortDescription: The White House Correspondents' Association announced it will host a rescheduled dinner after a gunman opened fire at the annual gala in April.

title: Allegheny men shot at 2024 Trump rally in PA sue US for negligence
shortDescription: Two Allegheny men who were shot at the 2024 Trump rally in Butler County allege negligence led to their injuries.

title: AIDS activists disrupt congressional testimony of OMB director Russell Vought
shortDescription: Protesters interrupted Office of Management and Budget (OMB) Director Russell Vought as he testified before the House Budget Committee on Wednesday, April 15, during a hearing on Trump’s 2027 budget request.

title: Trump settlement with IRS could unravel as judge demands answers
shortDescription: Last Friday, a federal judge in Miami demanded answers in Trump’s case against the IRS at the behest of dozens of retired judges who alleged fraud.

title: Texas Republicans, Democrats disagree sharply on voter fraud
shortDescription: A new Texas Southern University poll finds Texans split 50-50 on voter fraud vs. ballot access priorities, with the divide falling along party lines.

title: Trump taps Bill Pulte to replace Tulsi Gabbard as acting DNI
shortDescription: President Trump named Bill Pulte, director of the Federal Housing Finance Agency, as his new acting director of national intelligence.

title: Trump’s Anti-Weaponization Fund faced mounting political challenges | The Excerpt
shortDescription: Rare critiques from Republican lawmakers added to two legal challenges to doom Trump’s $1.8B settlement with the IRS in establishing the fund.
